nasb.text: Moses said to Pharaoh, “The honor is yours to tell me: when shall I entreat for you and your servants and your people, that the frogs be destroyed from you and your houses, that they may be left only in the Nile?”

esv.text: Moses said to Pharaoh, “Be pleased to command me when I am to plead for you and for your servants and for your people, that the frogs be cut off from you and your houses and be left only in the Nile.”

cnv.text: 摩西回答法老：“請指示，我要在甚麼時候為你和你的臣僕，以及你的人民，懇求耶和華除滅青蛙，使青蛙離開你和你的宮殿，只留在河裡呢？”

ccb.text: 摩西对法老说：“好吧，你要我在什么时候为你以及你的臣仆和百姓祷告，叫这些青蛙离开你和你的宫殿，只留在河里呢？”
